metrics.title: Governance Atlas
metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact-test ⌘K UC connected · 11.7% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. CERTIFICATION 142 results Certified 0 In Review 0 Uncertified 0 DOMAIN audit 1 communication 2 contact_management 2 deal_management 1 document_management 2 excess 17 CLASSIFICATION confidential 7 internal 24 low 2 ATTRIBUTES Critical Data Element Contains PII No PII DISCOVER Find trusted, governed data Search across catalogs, schemas, tables, columns, models, and glossary terms. Workspace-scoped results use Unity Catalog and governance store signals; actor-scoped protected reads remain restricted. Saved searches Advanced Showing 60 of 142 assets Sort: Relevance users excess.main.users — 50% 50% internal PII System users (underwriters, admins). Synced from Okta on login. Used for deal ownership, task assignment, and audit trails. ⋮ Open Record Open lineage tasks excess.main.tasks — 50% 50% internal PII Task/activity tracking for deals and contacts. Includes to-dos, follow-ups, calls, emails, and meetings. Supports SLA tracking and workflow automation. ⋮ Open Record Open lineage sla_trackers excess.main.sla_trackers — 50% 50% internal — Active SLA tracking instances. Monitors deals against SLA configurations. ⋮ Open Record Open lineage sla_configurations excess.main.sla_configurations — 50% 50% internal — SLA rule definitions. Defines t

state.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact-test ⌘K UC connected · 11.7% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Data availability is limited Taxonomy overview is hydrating from the governance store and Unity Catalog metadata. Glossary 0 CDE Registry 0 Showing 0 of 0 CDE registry rows CDE SOURCE-OF-RECORD COLUMN OWNER RECERT STATUS CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable Status and recertification are registry metadata values. Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned.
